name: Happened at work in Saint George but I changed jobs—still claim?

mainEntity.name: Happened at work in Saint George but I changed jobs—still claim?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, last injurious exposure** rule attributes to final Utah employer if continuous hazard.[2]

Prior jobs may contribute via second injury fund.[1]

**Key factors:**
- Disease progression timeline
- Multiple employer records

**Practical guidance:** Lawyer coordinates multi-employer claims.
Not barred.
